name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, low stock levels cause missed sales opportunities. We provide automated alerts instead of manual inventory tracking.
problem_solved: Stock levels fall below thresholds, causing missed sales opportunities.
features: Threshold alerts for low stock levels
